narrative:
Carrollton Ex Vill Sd (Carroll) exempted village school district has 10,271 registered voters, with 52.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 19.4 percentage points.
